revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀日本の教育}} 7世紀日本の[[教育]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{see also|Category:古代日本の教育機関}}
{{デフォルトソート:7 にほん きよういく}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:7世紀日本の教育]]|version=83636305}} [[ja:Category:7世紀日本の教育]]

[[ja:Category:7世紀日本の教育]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:7世紀日本の教育者]].
{{translated page|ja|7世紀日本の教育|comment=idk if categories need this template but doing it because I have OCD[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:37, 21 May 2025 (UTC)|2=Category:7世紀日本の教育|comment=did a replacement}} [[Category:7th century in Japan]] [[Category:7世紀の教育]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Education in Japan by Century]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work

revision.text:
